WALRUS
Verifiable data console

WalDrive

A desktop drive for Walrus — files you actually own.
Sui Overflow 2026 · Walrus track
DATA
The problem

Your agents make real data.
Where does it actually live?

×someone's server
×behind a login
×deletable by someone else
WalDrive stores your files on a decentralized network — owned by you, and verifiable by anyone.
01Generate a local wallet
02Grab gas — one click
03Drag files in — plural
04Render, verify, hash on screen
05Folders & tags — on-chain
06Version history & rollback
07Your storage, renewable
08Your key is your drive
MCP
Not just for humans

Agents get the same drive.
WalDrive ships an MCP server.

upload_file
list_files
download_file
get_file_info
SUI

WalDrive

The file-management & verifiable-data console for everything your agents store on Walrus.
✓Real bytes
✓Real ownership
✓Verifiable by anyone
